story.iWant: well-organized side panel layout (mở bên phải trình duyệt)
story.soThat: I can easily view analysis results với more space và persistent view

subtasks.subtask: Define header, content, và footer sections (full height)
Use flexbox hoặc grid for layout (100vh height)
Ensure layout is responsive to panel width (400-600px)
Test layout structure renders correctly in side panel
Display extension name: "ChainLens" hoặc "ChainLens Coin Analysis"
Add close button (X) to close side panel
Style header với consistent design (fixed height)
Create content area section (flex: 1, full height)
Test content area ready for results với long content
Add other action buttons if needed
Test layout với different side panel widths (400px, 500px, 600px)
Verify layout adapts correctly to panel width
Test layout doesn't break at different widths
Update background worker to handle side panel opening
Test side panel opens when clicking extension icon
Verify side panel doesn't close when clicking outside
Test side panel stays open during navigation

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Side panel layout với header, content area, và footer (full height, resizable)
Header shows extension name/logo với close button
Content area ready for analysis results display (scrollable, full height)
Footer với action buttons (Generate Report, etc.)
Responsive layout works với different panel widths (400-600px resizable)
Layout matches main app design patterns
Side panel opens when clicking extension icon (chrome.sidePanel API)
Side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside)

doc.title: Epic 12: Side Panel UI & Shared Components Integration
Story 12.1: Shared UI Components Integration
doc.snippet: UI components (Button, Card, Dialog) available và can be imported. Tailwind CSS configured.

file.title: Frontend Layout
file.snippet: Reference for layout patterns, spacing, typography, và design consistency.

dependencies.prerequisite: Story 12.1: Shared UI components must be available

constraints.constraint: Layout must be responsive và work với different content sizes
Layout must match main app design patterns
Use shared UI components từ Story 12.1
Side panel must open via chrome.sidePanel API when clicking extension icon
Side panel must persist (doesn't close when clicking outside)
Side panel sizing: Full height (100vh), width 400-600px (user resizable)

testing.test: Test layout structure renders correctly trong side panel
Test header, content, footer all display
Test responsive layout works với different panel widths (400-600px)
Test layout matches main app design
Test side panel opens when clicking extension icon
Test side panel persists (doesn't close when clicking outside)
